summary: A captured Fox News broadcast segment ('FOX NEWS ALERT / ILLEGAL TRUCKER CHARGED IN DEADLY CA CRASH') with an anchor, a remote guest, mangled-car crash footage, and the suspect's DHS photo. It is a re-posted cable-news report, not an agency-produced or music-driven youth-appeal video.
notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT; ILLEGAL TRUCKER CHARGED IN DEADLY CA CRASH; LODI, CA
